name: Corn Pudding - Budin De Elote
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Sea salt, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300°F. Place a heavy baking sheet on the lower rack of the oven.
2. Butter a 1-quart baking or souffle dish and sprinkle with bread crumbs. Set aside.
3. In a food processor, combine corn and milk. Process for 10-15 seconds or until reduced to a textured puree.
4. Beat butter until creamy. Gradually add corn and eggs, one at a time, beating after each addition.
5. Add sugar and salt. Mix well.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared dish.
7. Bake in preheated oven for about 35 minutes or until set and beginning to brown around edges.
8. Serve from the dish or carefully unmold onto serving dish.
Starchy field corn works best, ears of corn left intact that have been picked a few days earlier, for the starches to heighten, can be used.
The Art of Mexican Cooking
Reposted for you by: Bill Webster
